summary: John Smith at Acme Corp (john.smith@acmecorp.com) reported that the internal LLM assistant at 192.168.1.50 was leaking API keys including sk-proj-abc123def456 in its responses.
root_cause: System prompt included production API keys
impact: API key exposed to all internal users of the assistant
mitigations_applied: Rotated keys, removed from system prompt
source: Internal report from Acme Corp security team
